items.title: LIVE: Zelenskyy speaks at World Economic Forum in Davos
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy gives a special address at the annual meeting of the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland. U.S. President Donald Trump will take part virtually in the meeting on Thursday, the forum president said. Read more here: https://bit.ly/42mCW5j

#ukraine #volodymyrzelenskyy #live</article>

items.title: Aftermath of 6.4-magnitude earthquake in southern Taiwan
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A 6.4-magnitude earthquake struck southern Taiwan early Tuesday, leaving 27 people with minor injuries and some reported damage. The quake hit at 12:17 a.m. and was centered 38 kilometers (24 miles) southeast of Chiayi County Hall at a depth of 10 kilometers (6 miles), Taiwan’s Central Weather Administration said. The U.S. Geological Survey measured the earthquake at a less powerful magnitude 6. Read more here: https://bit.ly/40Fhwiw

#taiwan #earthquake #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>UNICEF goodwill ambassador, philanthropist and former soccer player David Beckham speaks at the annual meeting of the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, on his efforts over two decades advocating for children's rights, education and well-being. Read more here: https://bit.ly/42mCW5j

items.title: More than 2,000 migrants begin walking in southern Mexico despite Trump’s threats
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>More than 2,000 migrants from various countries began walking early Monday in southern Mexico hoping to reach the United States despite president Donald Trump’s threats of mass deportations and limiting asylum. (AP/Raúl Mendoza) Read more here: https://bit.ly/4h21qp8

#mexico #donaldtrump #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Biden commutes sentence for Leonard Peltier who was convicted of killing FBI agents
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>One of the last acts of President Biden before he left office was to commute the sentence of jailed Indigenous activist Leonard Peltier. Peltier had been serving two life sentences, convicted of killing two FBI agents at Wounded Knee, South Dakota in 1975. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4g5fZqD

#joebiden #usa #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump says US should broker a deal to own half of TikTok
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>As he sat down to sign a fresh round of executive orders Trump joked  with reporters, opining on everything from foreign policy to drones to the way he’s redecorated the Oval Office. The contrast with Joe Biden, who rarely engaged with journalists at length, couldn’t be more dramatic. Read more here: https://bit.ly/40Gu1KY

#donaldtrump #tiktok #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Trump finds a letter from Biden in the Oval Office desk
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump found a letter from his predecessor, Joe Biden, in the Oval Office’s Resolute desk Monday evening, but only after a journalist reminded him to look for it. Trump made the discovery while signing a series of executive orders.

#donaldtrump #joebiden #usa #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: LIVE: View from Gaza on third day of ceasefire
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Live view from Rafah as the ceasefire between Israel and Hamas allows for a major influx of aid and goods into Gaza. The United Nations said 915 trucks crossed into the territory on Monday and aid workers are ramping up deliveries.

#gaza #palestinian #live</article>

items.title: WATCH: Highlights from Donald Trump's inauguration
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Dignitaries from across Washington and around the world crammed into the U.S. Capitol Rotunda on Monday to watch presidential power transfer peacefully from Democrat Joe Biden to his Republican successor, Donald Trump. Follow live updates here: https://bit.ly/3Wq3cYU  

#trump #news #donaldtrump

items.title: Trump pardons Jan. 6 defendants, including rioters who attacked police
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump pardons more than 1,500 of his supporters charged with crimes in the Jan. 6, 2021, attack on the U.S. Capitol, including people who assaulted police, using his clemency powers on his first day in office. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3WrHOlM

#donaldtrump #politics #usa #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Asylum seekers with CBP One appointments turned away in Mexico after Trump's inauguration
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Just hours after the inauguration, migrants with CBP One appointments along the U.S.-Mexico border learned that all CBP One appointments were canceled. Dozens of asylum seekers in Matamoros, Mexico, were turned away in near-freezing temperatures. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3PIz5Ih

#donaldtrump #border #usa #mexico #news 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​
